title: HEM Frankincense Incense Sticks | Pack of 6 Hexagonal Tubes | Hand Crafted in India | Mesmerizing Fragrance | 301g
features: HEM Natural incense sticks guarantees a mesmerizing fragrance that is bound to last long. These raw incense sticks present the essence in its purest form. Their perfume is bound to change the ambience at home, be it during a Puja or whenever you light them.
Use HEM Frankincense to draw upon the energy of the sun to create sacred space, consecrate objects, and stimulate positive vibrations.
description: Product Description HEM Frankincense Incense Sticks Hem Incense From India HEM as a brand is known globally for manufacturing and exporting perfumed incense to over 70+ countries across the globe. Strong customer relations, quality products, and unabated R&D has been the core values that form the base foundation of HEM Corporation. Since 2008, HEM sells over 400 different fragrances across the globe namely in Europe, Middle East, Africa, Australia, North and South America as well as other Asian countries all these while maintaining high-quality standards. HEM Frankincense Incense Sticks - Hem Incense From India The lemony, woody, earthy, warm fragrance has been traditionally used in rituals because of the feelings of harmony it induces. Based on secret traditional fragrance formulas, it is a lemony, woody, refreshing delicate fragrance. It has been believed to have several medicinal benefits as per history. It was considered to be more expensive than gold and even gifted to baby Jesus on the occasion of his birth. Refreshing fragrance Elevates spirituality Woody fragrance Induces freshness Not Tested on Animals Product Benefits Promotes spirituality Reduce stress and anxiety Removes unnecessary smells Legal Disclaimer This product is meant to be used for the stated purpose of fragrant incense sticks/cones and dhoop sticks only. This product should not be used differently to the usage instructions on the packaging. Storage: Incense sticks/cones are always to be stored in cool, dark, dry, non-inflammable areas Usage Care: Never light incense or dhoop sticks/cones around or with inflammable objects like wires, wood; use these only with proper incense or dhoop stands Allergy testing: For persons prone to allergies, it is always recommended to test for allergy by first using the incense or dhoop stick for about 5 minutes. Always opt for incense or dhoop fragrances one is not allergic to. There are many choices and types of dhoop fragrances available.
